scope.summary: Scaffold the Tauri v2 + SvelteKit(SPA) + Tailwind v4 + shadcn-svelte shell that boots a window.
goals: Frontend and Rust core both build
Tailwind v4 + shadcn-svelte wired (Button + cn util)
App boots a desktop window via bun run tauri dev

acceptance.description: Frontend builds to build/ with no errors
